course_search_by_keyword.description: Search for courses in NCHU course database.
course_search_by_keyword.full_docstring:
Search for courses in NCHU course database.

Args:
    keyword: Search keyword
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)
    search_fields: Comma-separated fields to search in (default: 課程名稱,課程簡述,每週授課內容,開課系所,授課教師)
    case_sensitive: Whether search is case sensitive (default: False)
    include_details: Whether to include detailed course information (default: False)

Returns:
    JSON string containing search results

course_search_by_department.full_docstring:
Search courses by department.

Args:
    department: Department name to search for
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

Returns:
    JSON string containing search results

course_search_by_type.full_docstring:
Search courses by course type (required/elective).

Args:
    course_type: Course type to search for (e.g., 必修, 選修)
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

Returns:
    JSON string containing search results

course_get_stats.description: Get statistics about the course database.
course_get_stats.full_docstring:
Get statistics about the course database.

Returns:
    JSON string containing database statistics

course_get_detail.description: Get detailed information about a specific course.
course_get_detail.full_docstring:
Get detailed information about a specific course.

Args:
    course_id: Course ID (序號 or 流水號)

Returns:
    JSON string containing detailed course information

course_search_by_teacher.full_docstring:
Search courses by teacher name.

Args:
    teacher_name: Teacher name to search for
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

Returns:
    JSON string containing search results

course_get_teacher_courses.description: Get all courses taught by a specific teacher.
course_get_teacher_courses.full_docstring:
Get all courses taught by a specific teacher.

Args:
    teacher_name: Teacher name
    exact_match: Whether to use exact match (default: False)
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

Returns:
    JSON string containing teacher's courses

course_get_all_teachers.description: Get all teachers and their course statistics.
course_get_all_teachers.full_docstring:
Get all teachers and their course statistics.

Returns:
    JSON string containing all teachers and their course counts

answer_borrow_rules.description: Answer questions about borrowing rules via Gemini Pro 2.5.
answer_borrow_rules.full_docstring: Answer questions about borrowing rules via Gemini Pro 2.5.

confirm_then_answer.description: Describe the confirmation process before answering.
confirm_then_answer.full_docstring:
Describe the confirmation process before answering.

The returned message is an instruction to later agents. It explains
that they should first verify the user's NCHU library ID, confirm that
the question relates to borrowing regulations, and only then invoke
:func:`answer_borrow_rules` to produce the final reply.

library_search_books.description: Search books from NCHU Library using the Primo API.
library_search_books.full_docstring:
Search books from NCHU Library using the Primo API.

Args:
    query (str): The search keyword (supports Chinese characters).

Returns:
    List[Dict]: Each dictionary contains:
        - 'title': Book title
        - 'creator': Main author or contributor (cleaned)
        - 'link': Alma detail page link
        - 'error': Optional, if request fails

library_get_loan_history.description: Get a user's Alma loan history.
library_get_loan_history.full_docstring:
Get a user's Alma loan history.

Args:
    user_id (str): User identifier in the library system,  The `user_id` field is automatically provided by the backend.

Returns:
    List[Dict]: Loan records with fields:
        Index, User Name, Department, User Group, User ID,
        Author, Barcode, Loan Date, Return Date, Title, email

library_elearning_list.description: List e-learning courses with optional filters.
library_elearning_list.full_docstring:
List e-learning courses with optional filters.

Args:
    limit: Maximum number of courses to return (default: 20)
    search: Search keyword in course titles

library_elearning_categories.description: Get all course categories with course counts.

    limit: Maximum number of courses to return (default: 10)

school_activities_news_search.description: Search for school news by keyword and event date range found in the news content.
school_activities_news_search.full_docstring:
Search for school news by keyword and event date range found in the news content.

Args:
    keyword: Search keyword (default: "")
    date_range: Date range in format "YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD" to filter by event dates in content (default: "")
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

Returns:
    JSON string containing search results

school_activities_news_upcoming.description: Get school news containing upcoming events within a specified number of days.
school_activities_news_upcoming.full_docstring:
Get school news containing upcoming events within a specified number of days.

Args:
    days: Number of days to look ahead (default: 7)
    limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

Returns:
    JSON string containing upcoming event news

school_activities_news_stats.description: Get statistics about the school news.
school_activities_news_stats.full_docstring:
Get statistics about the school news.

Returns:
    JSON string containing database statistics

modules_list_all.description: Return the list of available course module names.
modules_list_all.full_docstring:
Return the list of available course module names.

Returns:
    List[str]: Names of all available modules.

modules_get_detail.description: Return detailed information for a specific module.
modules_get_detail.full_docstring:
Return detailed information for a specific module.

Args:
    name: Module name.

Returns:

modules_get_rules.description: Return the rules and regulations for course modules at NCHU.
modules_get_rules.full_docstring:
Return the rules and regulations for course modules at NCHU.

Returns:

rule_search_by_query.description: Search school rules by query string using dense vector retrieval.
rule_search_by_query.full_docstring:
Search school rules by query string.

Args:
    query: Query string (e.g., "獎懲規定", "請假流程").
    top_k: Number of results to return (1-10).

Returns:
    Dictionary containing retrieved documents and metadata.

rule_list_all.description: List all available school rule documents.
rule_list_all.full_docstring:
List all available school rule documents.

Args:
    limit: Maximum number of documents to return (1-100).

Returns:
    Dictionary with document metadata and counts.
